data.name: Goblin Quest: Remake
data.detailed_description:
Goblin Quest:Remake is a ground up rebuild of Goblin Quest.


Goblin Quest is an immersive fantasy sandbox with a nonlinear storyline.

The remake adds new mechanics, characters, towns, Activate battle system, and all maps remade for higher quality and detail.

Fulling allowing you to play the story your way, with the player choice being our guiding gameplay mechanic.

After finding yourself in the border prison within the forest, you can escape into the Eben Hinderlands, where you start to build out your story.

From playing the hero who saves the lands, the chief who rules their people, the stronghold master, or the villain who desires world domination and everything in the middle.

Delve into Strongholds, fight against wildlife, or wage war throughout the Eben.

All while discovering supporters who can aid you in multiple ways. Such as becoming a Chiefs, Right Hand, or bodyguard.

Purchase homes and shops to earn passive income while traveling.

Upgrade your weapons, armor, and homes you unlock as you play the game.

Who will you save, enlist, or discover as you traverse the lands?

The world will adapt and respond to your actions.

You decide your fate.

data.short_description: Goblin Quest:Remake is a ground up rebuild of our nonlinear fantasy game Goblin Quest. From playing the hero who saves the lands to the villain who destroys it, the world will adapt and respond to your actions. You decide your fate.

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows7, Windows8, Windows8.1, Windows10
  • 處理器: Intel Core 2 Duo or equivalent or greater
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Able to run 1920x1080
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
